text:
(In reply to Baptiste Daroussin from comment #3)
On 2021-09-23 18:00, Kurt Jaeger wrote:
>     Any deviations from these defaults:
>         Max message body size: 200KB
>         Not moderated
>         Open (subscription not required for) posting

Did that change since? Or was it already untrue then?
